basic_details.job_title: DMHO Jayashankar Bhupalpally Lab Technician Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: District Medical & Health Office Jayashankar Bhupalpally
basic_details.short_information: District Medical & Health Office Jayashankar Bhupalpally (DMHO Jayashankar Bhupalpally) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Lab Technician Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for healthcare jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

age_limit.age_details: Minimum 18 years, Maximum 44 years (as on 01.07.2026). Relaxations for SCs/STs/BCs/EW (5 years) and Physically Handicapped/Ex-servicemen (10 years).
age_limit.details: Lab Technician: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 44 years Age Relaxation: SCs/STs/BCs/EW: 5 years Physically Handicapped/Ex-servicemen: 10 years

qualification.education_qualification: Intermediate (10+2) and Diploma or certified course in Medical Laboratory Technology or equivalent. Experience in NTEP or Sputum Smear microscopy is preferential.
qualification.details: Lab Technician: Intermediate (10+2) and Diploma or certified course in Medical Laboratory Technology or equivalent. Experience in NTEP or Sputum Smear microscopy is preferential. 2 marks awarded for every completed six months of service in NTEP or Sputum microscopy, up to a maximum of 20 marks.

selection_process: Merit Basis (80 marks for essential qualification
20 marks for experience) Provisional Merit List display on official website Finalized merit list considering Rule of Reservation
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DMHO Jayashankar Bhupalpally Lab Technician Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.bhoopalapally.telangana.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 02-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DMHO Jayashankar Bhupalpally Lab Technician Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.district_medical_health_office_jayashank: Intermediate (10+2) and Diploma or certified course in Medical Laboratory Technology or equivalent. Experience in NTEP or Sputum Smear microscopy is preferential.
Minimum 18 years, Maximum 44 years (as on 01.07.2026). Relaxations for SCs/STs/BCs/EW (5 years) and Physically Handicapped/Ex-servicemen (10 years).

content_sections.heading: DMHO Jayashankar Bhupalpally Lab Technician Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DMHO Jayashankar Bhupalpally Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Lab Technician: Intermediate (10+2) and Diploma or certified course in Medical Laboratory Technology or equivalent. Experience in NTEP or Sputum Smear microscopy is preferential. 2 marks awarded for every completed six months of service in NTEP or Sputum microscopy, up to a maximum of 20 marks.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Lab Technician: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 44 years Age Relaxation: SCs/STs/BCs/EW: 5 years Physically Handicapped/Ex-servicemen: 10 years

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Merit Basis (80 marks for essential qualification, 20 marks for experience) Provisional Merit List display on official website Finalized merit list considering Rule of Reservation

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DMHO Jayashankar Bhupalpally Lab Technician Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.bhoopalapally.telangana.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 02-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DMHO Jayashankar Bhupalpally Lab Technician Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the organization releasing the Lab Technician recruitment notification?
faq.answer: The recruitment notification for Lab Technician posts has been released by the District Medical & Health Office Jayashankar Bhupalpally (DMHO Jayashankar Bhupalpally).

faq.question: Q2. What is the name of the post for this recruitment drive?
faq.answer: The post name for which this recruitment drive is being conducted is Lab Technician. There is one vacancy available for this position.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Lab Technician post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the Lab Technician post under the DMHO Jayashankar Bhupalpally recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the mode of application for DMHO Jayashankar Bhupalpally Lab Technician recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Lab Technician recruitment by DMHO Jayashankar Bhupalpally is offline. Candidates need to submit their applications in person.

faq.question: Q5. What are the essential educational qualifications required for the Lab Technician post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have Intermediate (10+2) and a Diploma or certified course in Medical Laboratory Technology or equivalent. Experience in NTEP or Sputum Smear microscopy is preferential.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for applying to the Lab Technician position?
faq.answer: Applicants must be a minimum of 18 years and a maximum of 44 years old as of 01.07.2026. Age relaxations are applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q7. What is the monthly salary for the Lab Technician post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Lab Technician post will receive a salary of Rs. 27,300/- per month on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q8. What is the last date to submit the offline application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the completed offline application form for the Lab Technician recruitment is 02 July 2026. Candidates are advised to apply before the deadline.

faq.question: Q9. What is the application fee for different categories?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 500/- for BC, EWS & OC categories, and Rs. 300/- for SC, ST, PWD categories. Fees are payable as per instructions in the notification.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for the Lab Technician post?
faq.answer: The selection process is based on merit, with 80 marks for essential qualifications and 20 marks for experience. A provisional merit list will be displayed, followed by a finalized list considering reservation rules.
